event OtcDealCreated(uint256 indexed dealId, address indexed deal, address indexed buyer, address seller, address tradeToken, uint256 usdtAmount, uint256 tokenAmount, bytes32 termsHash)

function createOtcDeal(address buyer, address seller, address tradeToken, uint256 usdtAmount, uint256 tokenAmount, uint64 fundingDeadline, uint16 feeBps, address feeRecipient, bytes32 termsHash) returns (uint256 dealId, address deal)
